---
title: "Quiz Test"
filters:
  - quizdown
---

# Limits Quiz

```quizdown
# Question 1

A limit is primarily concerned with

1. [ ] what happens exactly at a point.
2. [x] what happens near a point.
3. [ ] whether the function is increasing.
4. [ ] the slope of the function.

> Correct! A limit describes the behavior of a function as \(x\) approaches a point.
```
